name: SpecialToMovie
description: Automatically detects TV specials that are also standalone movies, creates hard links in your movie library, and syncs watch status bidirectionally.
overview: Detects TV specials that are also movies, creates hard links, and syncs watch status.

versions.changelog: Add watch-status-only sync option to prevent Continue Watching duplicates. Enforce ignore list and process force links during full scan and cleanup. Checkbox multi-select with bulk remove for linked pairs. Rename Cleanup task to Sync & Maintenance. Default cleanup interval reduced to 6 hours. UI polish and label improvements.

Replace per-row remove buttons with checkbox multi-select and bulk remove via three-dot menu. Full scan and cleanup now enforce ignore list (removing existing pairs) and process force links (creating missing pairs). Style UI buttons and checkboxes consistently.

Cache all API responses (not just 404s) to reduce TMDB/TVDB calls on repeated scans. Add OVA linking support for TVDB episodes tagged as OVA. Add Clear Metadata Cache button. Default cache duration changed to 7 days.

UI polish: fix table overflow for long filenames without spaces, scope ellipsis truncation to Episode and Movie columns, rebalance column widths, improve provider settings layout and library mapping filter display.

Add configurable Primary Metadata Provider (TMDB or TVDB) for conflict resolution. Persist not-found cache to disk across restarts. Batch RemoveForceLinkedPairs writes. Fix NotFoundCache timer race conditions.

New UI features: sortable column headers, Run Cleanup button, auto-refresh pagination, library filter, search debounce. Refactor scan/cleanup to use Jellyfin task scheduler. Batch PairStore writes. Fix FindExistingMovie cross-library matching. Fix CleanupTask ignoring AutoDeleteOnRemoval setting. Fix IUserManager.Users API for Jellyfin 10.11.9.
Cache TMDB/TVDB 404 responses to avoid repeated failed API calls (configurable TTL, default 14 days). Fix Linked Pairs table overflowing the screen on narrow viewports.

Delegate item deletion to Jellyfin instead of manual file operations. Improve two-way deletion UI with clearer warnings. Fix info disclosure in API test endpoints. Add search debounce and movie cache for single-episode processing.
Fix hard link failure on long file paths (Win32 MAX_PATH limit). Rename plugin display name to Special To Movie.
